# kUSBInformationDeviceIsRootHubMask

**Enumeration Case**

The mask indicating that the USB device is a root hub.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBInformationDeviceIsRootHubMask = (1 << kUSBInformationDeviceIsRootHub)
```
title: kUSBInformationDeviceIsRootHubMask
